name: Chicken in Cream of Mushroom Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 can (14 oz) Cream of mushroom soup, such as Campbell's
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the chicken in oil over medium heat until no pink remains, about 15 minutes to half an hour, turning occasionally.
2. Drain excess oil from the chicken.
3. Add sour cream and soup; mix well so everything is blended and the chicken is covered.
4. Reduce heat and simmer for 30–40 minutes, stirring occasionally. The sauce will thicken slightly.
5. Cook pasta (like rotini) until al dente, then stir it into the sauce with the chicken when ready to serve.
6. To reheat, add a splash of milk to the sauce and microwave for about 3 minutes.
This dish is simple yet flavorful, even if you usually dislike sour cream. You can also add sautéed fresh mushrooms near the end of cooking or use other creative additions. Typically, I cook 4–6 chicken pieces, which leftovers are great for lunch or dinner the next day.
